endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/{name}:activate
endpoints.description: Activates an existing bidding function. An activated function is available for invocation for the server-side TURTLEDOVE simulations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/{name}:archive
endpoints.description: Archives an existing bidding function. An archived function will not be available for function invocation for the server-side TURTLEDOVE simulations unless it is activated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/{parent}/biddingFunctions
endpoints.description: Lists the bidding functions that a bidder currently has registered.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/{parent}/biddingFunctions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
